headline: Goldman Sachs Sees More Upside for Marathon Petroleum (MPC) from Higher Jet Prices
summary: Marathon Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:MPC) is included among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy Now for a $1 Million Portfolio. On May 8, Goldman Sachs analyst Neil Mehta raised the firm’s price recommendation on Marathon Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:MPC) to $291 from $264. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. In a research note, Mehta said […]

headline: Has Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Run Too Far After Strong 1-Year Share Price Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Marathon Petroleum at US$249.09 is offering value or already reflects a lot of optimism, this breakdown can help you think about what the current share price might be implying. The stock has returned 1.3% over the past week, 10.6% over the past month, 50.8% year to date, and 55.6% over the last year. These gains naturally raise questions about how much of the story is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage of large U.S. refiners, including Marathon...
